# BP-92 negative variant: the context-aware group is used with a parent
lang: go
file: BP-92-variant-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"golang.org/x/sync/errgroup"
)

func run(parent context.Context) error {
	group, ctx := errgroup.WithContext(parent)
	group.Go(func() error {
		select {
		case <-ctx.Done():
			return ctx.Err()
		default:
			return nil
		}
	})
	return group.Wait()
}
